lane: Provider Input Preparation And Offline Canary Planning
project: AI Video Production Workspace Three Route Plan
title: Prepare Real Storyboard Keyframe Canary
scope: inspect existing app-registered storyboard image artifacts
inspect approved WebGPT storyboard keyframe files under data/imports and data/media
validate image readability, dimensions, mime, and sha256
select one best real storyboard keyframe candidate
generate dry-run canary plan and authorization phrase draft without provider calls
goal: Prepare a real storyboard keyframe canary input package for a future Runway Gen-4.5 single-submit authorization, without making any provider call.
acceptance: SHOT_001 through SHOT_004 WebGPT keyframes are reviewed.
Selected input is a real storyboard keyframe with a clear subject.
Selected artifact ID comes from the app media artifact registry.
Selected input is not the gradient fixture, audit image, or product reference.
Canary plan uses provider=runway, model=gen4.5, endpoint=POST /v1/image_to_video, X-Runway-Version=2024-11-06, duration_seconds=2, ratio=720:1280, and max_submit_calls=1.
Authorization phrase draft is generated for the next task.
No Runway or RunningHub call, upload, retry, credit consumption, real video generation, secret printing, raw provider payload recording, source overwrite, push, tag, release, or deploy occurs.
safe_actions_completed: reviewed SHOT_001 through SHOT_004 approved WebGPT keyframes
verified app registry artifact IDs for active storyboard_image artifacts
